description: 17 of 20 display names do not match plan's official Hattrick terminology. Uses generic English words instead of official names (e.g., 'very poor' instead of 'disastrous', 'mediocre' instead of 'formidable').
suggestedFix: Replace all display names with official Hattrick terminology from PHASE_1_PLAN.md: non-existent, disastrous, wretched, poor, weak, inadequate, passable, solid, excellent, formidable, outstanding, brilliant, magnificent, world class, supernatural, titanic, extra-terrestrial, mythical, magical, utopian (divine).

description: GetDisplayName_Progression_IsMonotonic test encodes wrong display names that match the buggy implementation rather than the plan.
suggestedFix: Update expectedProgression array to use official Hattrick terminology.

description: Test asserts Level 2 = 'very poor' but plan says 'disastrous'.
Test asserts Level 10 = 'mediocre' but plan says 'formidable'.
Test name has typo ('Mediacore') and asserts wrong Level 10 name.
suggestedFix: Fix typo and update expected value to 'formidable'.

description: Comment incorrectly calls Level 10 'mediocre' and 'pivot/midpoint of the scale'.
suggestedFix: Update comment to reflect official terminology.
